name: Tasa de Capitalización (Cap Rate)
description: Calcula la tasa de capitalización de un inmueble de inversión.
seo_description: Calcula la tasa de capitalización de un inmueble de inversión. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantánea. Calculadora facil de usar con desglose de.
example_label: Calculating cap rate for commercial property with $42,000 NOI valued at $525,000.
result_context: The cap_rate of {cap_rate}% indicates the property's unleveraged return based on current income.
mistakes: Using gross income instead of net operating income (NOI)
Not properly calculating NOI by subtracting all operating expenses
Comparing cap rates across different property types without adjustment
